commands.review_summary:
The branch threads tool `ctx.agentId` through Google Meet and Voice Call call creation, stores `CallRecord.agentId`, centralizes resolution, adds tests/proof script coverage, exports a gateway dispatch helper, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows tool context carries `agentId`, but Google Meet and Voice Call do not serialize/store it and downstream response generation falls back to the configured Voice Call agent.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor current-head proof plus maintainer/security judgment on the new plugin runtime gateway-dispatch ownership seam; automation cannot supply the contributor’s real setup proof.
